tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Note: For all the Dsus4's you can make it sound really cool if you alternate between 
a normal D and a Dsus4 by changing the high e string from the 3rd fret to the 
second fret quickly like just for one strum then switch back to Dsus4. Makes it 
sound more country :)

[tab]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
e|-----3-----2--3--------------|
B|-----3-----3--3--------------|
G|-----2-----2--2--------------|
D|-----0-----0--0--------------| Notice you're only on the D chord
A|-----------------------------| for one downstroke
E|-----------------------------|
strum: d du  d udu[/tab]


[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch] x2


[Verse]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                          [ch]Em7[/ch]
  Today was a fairytale, you were the prince[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Dsus4[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
I used to be a damsel in distress[/tab]
[tab]([ch]G[/ch])         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                               [ch]Em7[/ch]
You took me by the hand and you picked me up at six[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Today was a fairytale[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Today was a fairytale[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                     [ch]Em7[/ch]
   Today was a fairytale, I wore a dress[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dsus4[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
You wore a dark grey t-shirt[/tab]
[tab]([ch]G[/ch])        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                             [ch]Em7[/ch]
You told me I was pretty when I looked like a mess[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Today was a fairytale[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] / [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
 Time slows down  whenever you're around[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                      [ch]Em7[/ch]
Can you feel this magic in the air[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dsus4[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
It must have been the way you kissed me[/tab]
[tab]([ch]G[/ch])   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                          [ch]Em7[/ch]
Fell in love when I saw you standin' there[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
It must have been the way[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]
Today was a fairytale[/tab]

It must have been the way[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Today was a fairytale[/tab]

Today was a fairytale[/tab]

 Today was a fairytale, all that I could say[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dsus4[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
It's now getting so much clearer[/tab]
[tab]([ch]G[/ch])     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                               [ch]Em7[/ch]
Nothing made sense till the time I saw your face[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Today was a fairytale[/tab]
